title: OFLC Announces Webinar on March 25, 2026, to Provide Technical Assistance to Stakeholders on the Process for Filing CW-1 Applications for Employment in the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands | Flag.dol.gov
content:
## OFLC Announces Webinar on March 25, 2026, to Provide Technical Assistance to Stakeholders on the Process for Filing CW-1 Applications for Employment in the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands
The Office of Foreign Labor Certification invites interested stakeholders to participate in a webinar that provides technical assistance and helpful tips for preparing the CW-1 Application for Prevailing Wage Determination (Form ETA-9141C), the Application for Temporary Employment Certification (Form ETA-9142C), the CW-1 Job Vacancy Announcement, and recruitment reports. The webinar also will cover some of the most pressing and common post-filing issues employers encounter.
Wednesday, March 25, 2026: 7:00 PM | (UTC-05:00) Eastern Time (US & Canada) | 1 hr. Thursday, March 26, 2026, 9:00AM | Chamorro Standard Time | 1 hr.
Join from the meeting link: https://usdol.webex.com/usdol/j.php?MTID=m444c1dc91876dfebf4601bb6bc01e5be
Join by meeting number: Meeting number (access code): 2825 203 2141 Meeting password: OFLC2026
Tap to join from a mobile device (attendees only): US Toll Free: 1-877-465-7975, code: 28252032141 US Toll: 1-210-795-0506, code: 28252032141
Join by phone: US Toll Free: 1-877-465-7975 US Toll: 1-210-795-0506
